old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-1qio","title":"Authorize CoAP mutating resources","description":"Discovered during project-LICHEN-m5m1 review. CoAP server resource registration exposes mutating handlers such as /config PUT and /msg/inbox POST without an implemented local-admin, transport access-level, or OSCORE authorization check. CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_OSCORE does not currently enforce these handlers. Define and enforce authorization at dispatch/resource boundaries.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Every mutating CoAP resource has an explicit authorization policy. 2. Unauthorized mesh/local requests fail closed. 3. Authorized local-admin/OSCORE paths have independent request/response tests. 4. Read-only resources remain available per spec. 5. Three independent security review passes complete.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T00:30:58.781573Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T00:30:58.781573Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-1qio","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-m5m1.5","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-16T00:30:58.906606Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
